## Purpose
<!-- Describe the problem or need driving this change. Link related issues, e.g. "Resolves #123". -->

## Approach
<!-- Describe how you implemented the change and any notable design decisions or trade-offs. -->

## Testing
<!-- How was this verified? -->
- [ ] `make test` (unit tests) pass
- [ ] `make test-integration` pass (if the change touches DB / store / handler behavior)
- [ ] `make lint` passes

## Checklist
- [ ] Code is `gofmt`-ed and passes `go vet` / `golangci-lint`
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / TESTING / code comments) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens are committed

## Release note
<!-- One-line summary for the changelog, or "N/A". -->

## Related PRs / issues
<!-- Optional: links to related PRs or issues. -->
